summary: Backend regression testing after refactoring (server.py 2063→1669 lines). All 53 tests passed across 3 test files. Refactoring extracted models.py, helpers.py, security.py, constants.py - all imports working correctly. No endpoints broken.
passed_tests: TestFullCRUDCycle: Complete CRUD cycle (categorias → animais → movimentacoes → eventos → producoes → despesas → lembretes)
TestAuthEndpoints: POST /api/auth/login responds (401 for invalid creds), GET /api/auth/me requires auth, POST /api/users requires admin
TestAnimaisFilhos: GET /api/animais/{id}/filhos returns 404 for non-existent, returns list for existing
TestDeleteAnimalWithDependencies: DELETE returns 409 without force, 200 with force=true (cascata)
TestDeleteCategoriaWithDespesa: DELETE returns 409 without force, 200 with force=true
TestLembretesAlertas: GET /api/lembretes/alertas returns alertas with required fields (animal_tag, animal_tipo, etc.)
TestDashboardStats: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns correct structure with receitas from producoes+movimentacoes
TestProducaoCRUD: Full CRUD (POST, GET, PUT, DELETE /api/producoes)
TestProducaoBulkRecorrente: POST /api/producoes/bulk with recorrente=true creates 30-day intervals
TestEventosBulk: POST /api/eventos/bulk creates events for tag range
TestImportsWork: Server responding, CALENDARIO_PADRAO accessible, Pydantic models validating
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring well executed - all extracted modules (models.py, helpers.py, security.py, constants.py) properly imported
CALENDARIO_PADRAO in constants.py correctly accessible from server.py
Pydantic models in models.py working correctly with validation
Security functions (JWT, bcrypt) in security.py working correctly
Helper functions (serialize_doc, prepare_for_db) in helpers.py working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up automatically during tests using unique prefixes (REG{uuid})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring validated - server.py reduced from 2063 to 1669 lines by extracting: models.py (Pydantic models), helpers.py (serialize_doc, prepare_for_db), security.py (JWT, bcrypt, auth middleware), constants.py (CALENDARIO_PADRAO). All 53 tests pass. Test files: test_refactoring_regression.py (21 tests), test_visao_2_0.py (17 tests), test_melhorias.py (15 tests).
